name: Mihnea-Teodor Stoica
tagline: Machine learning, competitive programming, and side projects
about: I'm a high school student from Romania. Most of my time goes into olympiads, building things, and trying to understand how systems actually work.
Lately, I've been focusing more on AI — both individually and through initiatives like clubs, events, and educational work.
currently: Building things in AI and education
Getting better at machine learning through projects and competitions
